inputs.name: accessibleDescription
inputs.description: Defines the accessible description of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleDescriptionRef
inputs.description: Defines the IDs of the HTML Elements that describe the component.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Defines the IDs of the HTML Elements that label the component.

inputs.name: itemsFitContent
inputs.description:
Determines whether the segmented button items should be sized to fit their content.

If set to `true`, each item will be sized to fit its content, with any extra space distributed after the last item.
If set to `false` (the default), all items will be equally sized to fill the available space.

outputs.name: ui5SelectionChange
outputs.description: Fired when the selected item changes.
